title: pillowy fatty moroccan mitsuba tagine
description: traditional moroccan dish featuring mitsuba and served with crispy double-fried chicken. perfect for a family dinner or special occasion.
instructions: heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
add the onion, garlic, and ginger, and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
add the mitsuba, turmeric, cumin, coriander, and paprika, and continue to sauté for another 5 minutes.
season with salt and black pepper to taste.
add the double-fried chicken to the skillet and toss to coat with the mitsuba mixture.
cover the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
fluff the mitsuba mixture with a fork and serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs, if desired.
serve the crispy double-fried chicken on top of the mitsuba mixture, and enjoy!
serve with traditional moroccan flatbread or couscous, if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
